title: Privacy Policy & Cookie Usage
intro: Welcome to ranzakOS! Before proceeding, please read how we handle your data and cookies on this website.
section1Text: ranzakOS is a web-based portfolio operating system simulator meant for personal presentation and interactive experiences. It runs entirely inside your browser.
section2Text: To maintain state, settings, and authentications (like keeping you logged in when you refresh the page, or saving your windows and themes), this site heavily relies on LocalStorage and Cookies. We DO NOT use them for tracking, advertising, or sharing with third parties.
section3Text: We do not collect personal identifiable data (PII) beyond what you voluntarily provide in apps that require interaction. Everything stays on your local machine.
section4Text: We may use basic analytics to monitor site traffic. This data is fully anonymized.
